title: Nested Analysis Loops Catch Bugs Before They Commit
angle: How nested phase-level analysis loops (separate from the program loop) catch bugs before the commit — distinct from the existing loop-structure post
pipeline: ralph-site → content/blog/ + git push → copied to current release

four_marketing_questions_covered.what_is_it: composable loop framework with nested phase-level analysis loops
four_marketing_questions_covered.who_is_it_for: developers doing unattended AI coding runs who want bugs caught before commit
four_marketing_questions_covered.why_different: separates phase loops from program loops — analysis catches implementation mistakes before commit
four_marketing_questions_covered.why_now: turns unattended runs into automated senior-dev review instead of bug creation

context.existing_similar_posts: ai-coding-workflow-automation-loop-structure.md (broad loop-structure post). This is a distinct, finer-grained angle on nested phase-level analysis loops vs. the program loop.
